{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| label: Title
#| output: asis
cat("# ", sR$title, "\n\n")
cat("## ", sR$subtitle, "\n\n")
cat(glue::glue(sR$generated_on, date = format(Sys.Date(), format = "%x")), "\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: Patient not found
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr '!patient_found'
cat(glue::glue(sR$patient_not_found,
  patient_id = patient_id, department_code = department_code), "\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: Demographics
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found'

cat("## ", sR$section$demographics, "\n\n")

ga_weeks <- patient$total_gestation_days %/% 7
ga_days <- patient$total_gestation_days %% 7
ga_display <- if (!is.na(patient$total_gestation_days)) {
  glue::glue(sR$gestational_age_format, weeks = ga_weeks, days = ga_days)
} else {
  sR$not_available
}

sex_code <- as.character(patient$sex)
sex_key <- switch(sex_code, f = "female", m = "male", u = "undetermined", sex_code)
sex_display <- sR$sex[[sex_key]] %||% sex_code

dept_name <- if (nrow(department) > 0) department$displayName else ""
hosp_name <- if (nrow(hospital) > 0) hospital$displayName else ""

demo_df <- tibble::tibble(
  Field = c(
    sR$field$patient_id,
    sR$field$sex,
    sR$field$birth_weight,
    sR$field$gestational_age,
    sR$header$department,
    sR$field$hospital
  ),
  Value = c(
    patient$patient_id,
    sex_display,
    as.character(patient$birth_weight),
    as.character(ga_display),
    dept_name,
    hosp_name
  )
)

knitr::kable(demo_df, col.names = NULL)
```

```{r}
#| label: Enrollment and Admission
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found'

cat("\n\n## ", sR$admission_sc, "\n\n")

if (nrow(enrollment) > 0) {
  enr <- enrollment[1, ]
  enr_df <- tibble::tibble(
    Field = c(sR$field$enrolled_at),
    Value = c(format(enr$enrolledAt, format = "%x"))
  )

  if (nrow(admission) > 0) {
    adm <- admission[1, ]
    adm_fields <- c()
    adm_values <- c()
    if ("type" %in% names(adm) && !is.na(adm$type)) {
      type_label <- sR$admission_type[[as.character(adm$type)]]
      if (is.null(type_label)) type_label <- as.character(adm$type)
      adm_fields <- c(adm_fields, sR$field$admission_type)
      adm_values <- c(adm_values, type_label)
    }
    if ("dol" %in% names(adm) && !is.na(adm$dol)) {
      adm_fields <- c(adm_fields, sR$field$day_of_life)
      adm_values <- c(adm_values, as.character(adm$dol))
    }
    if (length(adm_fields) > 0) {
      enr_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(enr_df,
        tibble::tibble(Field = adm_fields, Value = adm_values))
    }
  }

  knitr::kable(enr_df, col.names = NULL)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: Infections
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found'

cat("\n\n## ", sR$section$infections, "\n\n")

pathogen_taxonomy <- neoipcr::get_pathogen_taxonomy()

format_pathogens <- function(agent_findings, taxonomy) {
  if (is.null(agent_findings) || nrow(agent_findings) == 0) return(NULL)

  result <- agent_findings |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      taxonomy |>
        dplyr::distinct(input_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
        dplyr::select(pathogen_key = input_id, name = output_name),
      by = "pathogen_key") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      resistance_flags = purrr::pmap_chr(
        list(
          `3gcr` = if ("3gcr" %in% names(agent_findings)) `3gcr` else NA,
          car = if ("car" %in% names(agent_findings)) car else NA,
          cor = if ("cor" %in% names(agent_findings)) cor else NA,
          mrsa = if ("mrsa" %in% names(agent_findings)) mrsa else NA,
          vre = if ("vre" %in% names(agent_findings)) vre else NA
        ),
        function(`3gcr`, car, cor, mrsa, vre) {
          flags <- c()
          if (!is.na(`3gcr`) && `3gcr` == "yes") flags <- c(flags, "3GCR")
          if (!is.na(car) && car == "yes") flags <- c(flags, "CARBR")
          if (!is.na(cor) && cor == "yes") flags <- c(flags, "COLR")
          if (!is.na(mrsa) && mrsa == "yes") flags <- c(flags, "MRSA")
          if (!is.na(vre) && vre == "yes") flags <- c(flags, "VRE")
          if (length(flags) == 0) return("")
          paste(flags, collapse = ", ")
        }
      )
    )

  if ("source" %in% names(result)) {
    result <- result |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        source_label = purrr::map_chr(
          as.character(source),
          ~ sR$pathogen_source[[.x]] %||% .x))
    result |>
      dplyr::select(
        !!sR$field$pathogen_name := name,
        !!sR$field$resistance := resistance_flags,
        !!sR$field$source := source_label)
  } else {
    result |>
      dplyr::select(
        !!sR$field$pathogen_name := name,
        !!sR$field$resistance := resistance_flags)
  }
}

has_infections <- any(nrow(bsi) > 0, nrow(nec) > 0, nrow(hap) > 0, nrow(ssi) > 0)

if (!has_infections) {
  cat(sR$no_infections, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
#| label: BSI
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found && nrow(bsi) > 0'

cat("\n\n### ", sR$primary_sepsis_bsi_sc, "\n\n")

for (i in seq_len(nrow(bsi))) {
  ev <- events |> dplyr::filter(event_key == bsi$event_key[i])
  cat("**", sR$field$event_date, ":** ", format(ev$occurredAt, format = "%x"), "\n\n", sep = "")

  bsi_pathogens <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == bsi$event_key[i], !secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(bsi_pathogens) > 0) {
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(bsi_pathogens, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  bsi_sec <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == bsi$event_key[i], secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(bsi_sec) > 0) {
    cat("#### ", sR$section$secondary_bsi, "\n\n")
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(bsi_sec, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: NEC
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found && nrow(nec) > 0'

cat("\n\n### ", sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc, "\n\n")

for (i in seq_len(nrow(nec))) {
  ev <- events |> dplyr::filter(event_key == nec$event_key[i])
  cat("**", sR$field$event_date, ":** ", format(ev$occurredAt, format = "%x"), "\n\n", sep = "")

  nec_sec <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == nec$event_key[i], secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(nec_sec) > 0) {
    cat("#### ", sR$section$secondary_bsi, "\n\n")
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(nec_sec, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: HAP
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found && nrow(hap) > 0'

cat("\n\n### ", sR$pneumonia_sc, "\n\n")

for (i in seq_len(nrow(hap))) {
  ev <- events |> dplyr::filter(event_key == hap$event_key[i])
  cat("**", sR$field$event_date, ":** ", format(ev$occurredAt, format = "%x"), "\n\n", sep = "")

  hap_pathogens <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == hap$event_key[i], !secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(hap_pathogens) > 0) {
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(hap_pathogens, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  hap_sec <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == hap$event_key[i], secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(hap_sec) > 0) {
    cat("#### ", sR$section$secondary_bsi, "\n\n")
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(hap_sec, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: SSI
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found && nrow(ssi) > 0'

cat("\n\n### ", sR$surgical_site_infection_sc, "\n\n")

for (i in seq_len(nrow(ssi))) {
  ev <- events |> dplyr::filter(event_key == ssi$event_key[i])
  cat("**", sR$field$event_date, ":** ", format(ev$occurredAt, format = "%x"), "\n\n", sep = "")

  ssi_pathogens <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == ssi$event_key[i], !secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(ssi_pathogens) > 0) {
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(ssi_pathogens, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  ssi_sec <- pathogens |>
    dplyr::filter(event_key == ssi$event_key[i], secondary_bsi)
  if (nrow(ssi_sec) > 0) {
    cat("#### ", sR$section$secondary_bsi, "\n\n")
    ptbl <- format_pathogens(ssi_sec, pathogen_taxonomy)
    if (!is.null(ptbl)) print(knitr::kable(ptbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: Surgical Procedures
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found'

cat("\n\n## ", sR$surgical_procedures, "\n\n")

if (nrow(surgery) == 0) {
  cat(sR$no_procedures, "\n")
} else {
  surgery_display <- surgery |>
    dplyr::left_join(events |> dplyr::select(event_key, occurredAt),
      by = "event_key") |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      !!sR$field$procedure_date := format(occurredAt, format = "%x"),
      !!sR$field$procedure_code := main_procedure_code,
      !!sR$field$procedure_category :=
        neoipcr::get_procedure_category(main_procedure_code)
    )
  knitr::kable(surgery_display)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: Surveillance End
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found && nrow(surveillance_end) > 0'

cat("\n\n## ", sR$surveillance_end_sc, "\n\n")

se <- surveillance_end[1, ]
se_event <- events |> dplyr::filter(event_key == se$event_key)

format_days_value <- function(n) paste(n, sR$days)

# Summary table: date, reason, patient days
se_fields <- c(sR$field$surveillance_end_date)
se_values <- c(format(se_event$occurredAt, format = "%x"))

if ("reason" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$reason)) {
  reason_label <- sR$surveillance_end_reason[[as.character(se$reason)]]
  if (is.null(reason_label)) reason_label <- as.character(se$reason)
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$field$surveillance_end_reason)
  se_values <- c(se_values, reason_label)
}

if ("patient_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$patient_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$field$patient_days)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$patient_days))
}

# Individual device days
if ("cvc_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$cvc_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$device$cvc)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$cvc_days))
}
if ("pvc_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$pvc_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$device$pvc)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$pvc_days))
}
if ("inv_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$inv_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$device$inv)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$inv_days))
}
if ("niv_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$niv_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$device$niv)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$niv_days))
}

# Individual protective factor days
if ("human_milk_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$human_milk_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$human_milk)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$human_milk_days))
}
if ("kangaroo_care_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$kangaroo_care_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$kangaroo_care)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$kangaroo_care_days))
}
if ("probiotic_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$probiotic_days)) {
  se_fields <- c(se_fields, sR$probiotics)
  se_values <- c(se_values, format_days_value(se$probiotic_days))
}

knitr::kable(tibble::tibble(Field = se_fields, Value = se_values),
  col.names = NULL)

# Antibiotics subsection with substance sub-list
if ("ab_days" %in% names(se) && !is.na(se$ab_days)) {
  cat("\n\n### ", sR$antibiotics, "\n\n")
  cat("- **", sR$field$antibiotic_days, ":** ",
    format_days_value(se$ab_days), "\n", sep = "")

  subst <- substance_days |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(substance_code), !is.na(days))

  if (nrow(subst) > 0) {
    substance_names <- ds$metadata$options |>
      dplyr::filter(optionSet_code == "NEOIPC_ANTIMICROBIAL_SUBSTANCES") |>
      dplyr::select(code, displayName)

    subst_named <- subst |>
      dplyr::left_join(substance_names, by = c("substance_code" = "code")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(name = dplyr::coalesce(displayName, substance_code))
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(subst_named))) {
      cat("  - ", subst_named$name[j], ": ",
        format_days_value(subst_named$days[j]), "\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: Audit Trail
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'patient_found'

cat("\n\n## ", sR$section$audit_trail, "\n\n")

if (nrow(event_details) > 0 && "createdAt" %in% names(event_details)) {
  event_type_labels <- list(
    adm = sR$admission_sc,
    bsi = sR$primary_sepsis_bsi_sc,
    end = sR$surveillance_end_sc,
    hap = sR$pneumonia_sc,
    nec = sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc,
    pro = sR$surgical_procedure_sc,
    ssi = sR$surgical_site_infection_sc
  )

  audit_rows <- events |>
    dplyr::left_join(event_details, by = "event_key") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      type_label = purrr::map_chr(
        as.character(event_type_key),
        ~ event_type_labels[[.x]] %||% .x)) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      !!sR$field$event_type := type_label,
      !!sR$field$event_date := format(occurredAt, format = "%x"),
      !!sR$headerList$created := format(createdAt, format = "%x %X"),
      !!sR$field$updated_at := format(updatedAt, format = "%x %X")
    )
  knitr::kable(audit_rows)
} else {
  cat(sR$no_audit_data, "\n")
}
```
